pageText: Town | The AI Assistant That Does the Work Town is officially out of beta. Read a note from the founders → Features Routines Integrations Pricing Sign in Sign up Learns how you work, then gets to work. Learns how you work, Learns how you work, The unusually helpful AI assistant. Meet your Townie bud bud@town.com then gets to work. Norm drafts Elle ’s Morning Briefing. Everyone in Town gets a Townie . The most helpful thing about them? They do the work just the way you would. Min drafts Chris ’s client proposals. Norm drafts Elle ’s Morning Briefing. Nina wrote down what she needed to get done today. Claus read the list, got to work, and came back with updates. Send an email to my vendors about quarter close Claus Send an email to my vendors about quarter close Claus RSVP to Figma’s Config panel You need to decide if you want to join Figma’s panel discussion Confirm the rescheduled dinner Needs input: Xolo rescheduled your dinner with Rahul to Tuesday night, after checking with his Townie Dinner with Rahul at Saison Scheduled for Thursday, 7:30pm Reply to the Acme renewal thread Sent — Claus drafted it in your voice “What used to take me hours took 10 minutes. Town makes me look really good.” Adriana Roche and Pearl Head of Talent, Uncork Capital Routines Routines Townies handle the repeat work. Townies Snap@town.com Snap Snap@town.com handle the repeat work. Townies Snap@town.com Snap Snap@town.com handle the repeat work. Townies Snap@town.com Snap Snap@town.com handle the repeat work. Townies Snap@town.com Snap Snap@town.com handle the repeat work. Snap has a routine. Every Friday, Snap checks Beth's client threads and writes a status summary for each account. Beth wakes up and they're already there. Snap has a routine. Every Friday, Snap checks Beth's client threads and writes a status summary for each account. Beth wakes up and they're already there. Daily Client Summary Start with a Town-made Routine, or describe your own. All Inbox Calendar Meeting Prep Stay Informed Relationships Operations Describe your own Every Friday at 4pm, scan my open PRs and draft a team status update. Build it Auto-inbox Watches for new emails, applies labels based on the type of message, drafts responses when a reply is clearly warranted, and helps with scheduling. Manage Your Inbox Decline Cold Outreach Detects unsolicited recruiter and cold sales outreach, labels those emails, and optionally drafts a polite decline for review. Manage Your Inbox Schedule Optimizer Analyzes your week ahead every Sunday evening and emails you actionable recommendations to cluster meetings, protect focus time, and avoid burnout. Manage Your Calendar Meeting Briefing Researches upcoming meetings, skips low-signal events, emails you a concise briefing, saves it as a Town document, and can optionally add a private calendar copy. Prepare for Meetings Contact Research Dossier When labeled emails arrive from new people, this routine researches the contact and company, then delivers a structured dossier for meeting prep and outreach strategy. Prepare for Meetings Morning Briefing A daily email with your schedule, urgent items that need attention, and updates on topics you care about — plus an audio version for on the go. Stay Informed Competitive Intel Briefing Scans the web for news, product launches, and strategic moves from your competitors, then delivers a structured briefing on your schedule. Stay Informed Newsletter Digest Sends you a concise digest of your labeled newsletters on your chosen schedule. Stay Informed GitHub Reports It aggregates development activity to keep you synced on what is being built, merged, and blocked without hunting around code. Stay Informed Relationship Reconnect On your chosen weekly schedule, get personalized catch-up suggestions for people you've meaningfully connected with but have not contacted recently. Nurture Relationships Deal Spotter Scans inbound email for sales and business development opportunities, logs qualified signals to Google Sheets, and recommends immediate next steps. Nurture Relationships Invoice & Expense Logger Detects invoices and receipts in your email, extracts key details, logs them to a Google Sheet, and optionally creates a draft email to your expense tracking service. Streamline Operations Travel & Booking Organizer Detects flight confirmations and hotel bookings in your email, labels them, extracts key details, and logs everything to a Google Sheet. Streamline Operations New User Research Monitors a Slack channel for new user signups and posts research summaries with professional background, company info, and key context. Overview Overview Members DL 3 members Team routines 4 Celebration Announcement Send a birthday or work anniversary annoucement Weekly Financial Summary Sends a weekly financial summary per accoun Weekly Client Summary Summarizes the interactions per client every Travel Logger Automatically update team-travel-calendar Team integrations 6 Townies work with over 50 integrations and counting. All Analytics API CRM Database Development Finance File Storage Messaging Project Management Gmail Read, search, and manage your inbox, including drafting and sending emails, organizing with labels, and accessing attachments. Google Workspace Google Calendar View your schedule, create meetings with attendees and Google Meet links, edit events, and manage your calendar. Google Workspace Google Docs Create, read, and update Google Docs with native formatting and flexible editing modes. Google Workspace Google Drive Search, read, create, and update files in Drive, including Docs and Sheets. Google Workspace Google Sheets Create, read, and update Google Sheets, including adding tabs and updating ranges.
